title: merxmuellera aureocephala
side_effects: Merxmuellera aureocephala can have side effects if used improperly, such as severe skin irritation, allergic reactions, and respiratory issues. Prolonged exposure to the plant's volatile compounds can lead to headaches, dizziness, and nausea. In rare cases, excessive consumption of the plant's extracts can cause liver damage and kidney strain, potentially resulting in long-term health complications. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using the Merxmuellera aureocephala plant for any health benefits.
